name: New Fashioned Rhu-Berry Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce pkg. refrigerated pie crust, or homemade (2 crust)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a 2-crust pie or make homemade pastry.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients. Toss lightly.
4. Spoon into a crust-lined pan.
5. Top with the second crust. Seal edges and flute.
6. Cut slits in the top crust.
7. Bake at 400°F for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown. Cover the edge of the crust with strips of foil after 15-20 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
